title: hibbertia mollis
intro: Hibbertia mollis, also known as Guinea Flower, is a small, shrub-like plant native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against cell damage. Hibbertia mollis can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
